label: full-ledger-review-20260711

review_method.primary: Static contract-ledger review derived from exact XCTest method identities, domains, layers, execution tiers, and preserved scenario counts.
review_method.antipattern_screen: Interactive Devin source review sampled the largest pending suites for invocation-only, no-crash, non-nil-only, source-shape, constant-restatement, report-only, arbitrary-sleep, duplicate, and omnibus patterns.
external_research: DeepWiki repository-specific test-quality and optimizer guidance
Context7 /swiftlang/swift-testing guidance for parameterization, concurrency, and isolation
review_method.decision_rule: Retain executable IDs unless source inspection establishes a missing observable oracle, obsolete contract, exact duplication, or equivalent parameterized setup and outcome. Candidate name symmetry alone is insufficient for consolidation.

source_body_audit.disposition: All exact methods were located. Helper wrappers were retained when they invoke shared discriminating-oracle helpers; six proven equivalent pairs were consolidated. The three non-nil-only candidates protect ISO-8601 acceptance, window-title publication, and watcher-publisher attachment respectively. Sleep and source-shape matches were treated as review queues rather than automatic removals because most protect bounded concurrency, cancellation, repository fixtures, or diagnostics contracts.

candidate_consolidations_deferred.reason: Interactive review found several name-symmetric families, but most had materially different setup or incomplete body-level equivalence proof. Preserving independent executable contracts avoids speculative omnibus tables.

timing_claim: none; this campaign resolves review metadata debt and makes no XCTest performance claim

validation.static_ledger_source_reconciliation: pass: 3143 default executable methods; no stale IDs; two opt-in benchmark methods and one non-test helper excluded
validation.structured_autoreview: clean: no accepted or actionable findings
validation.root_xctest_and_authoritative_list: not runnable on Linux host because the macOS app imports Darwin
validation.swiftlint: not runnable on Linux host because SourceKitten cannot load libsourcekitdInProc.so
